_comment: Verified Indian festival calendar 2026-2030 for the kirana stock-up nudge. Dates checked against drikpanchang.com (New Delhi / IST). Muslim festivals (estimated:true) are moon-sighting dependent (+/-1 day). proactive.py surfaces EVERY listed festival and falls back to holidays.India for years not listed here. Extend with more years/festivals by adding ISO dates below.

stock_hints.makar sankranti: til-gud, laddoo, peanuts, gajak/chikki, khichdi raashan, patang/manjha
stock_hints.vasant panchami: besan/boondi laddoo, kesar, yellow mithai, fruits, puja samagri
stock_hints.maha shivratri: vrat items (kuttu/singhara atta, sabudana, sendha namak), milk, fruits, dry fruits, thandai
stock_hints.holika dahan: gujiya & mithai, dry fruits, popcorn/peanuts, nariyal, puja samagri
stock_hints.holi: gulaal/colours, pichkari, gujiya & mithai, thandai, cold drinks, namkeen, dry fruits
stock_hints.ram navami: vrat items (kuttu/singhara atta, sabudana, sendha namak), fruits, panjiri, mithai
stock_hints.hanuman jayanti: boondi laddoo, prasad items, sindoor, fruits, puja samagri
stock_hints.akshaya tritiya: mithai, dry fruits, gift packs, puja samagri (subh kharidari ka din - bheed zyada)
stock_hints.raksha bandhan: rakhi, mithai, chocolates, dry fruits, gift packs
stock_hints.janmashtami: makhan-mishri, dahi, dry fruits, panjiri, fruits, vrat items
stock_hints.ganesh chaturthi: modak/mithai, dry fruits, nariyal, durva, puja samagri
stock_hints.navratri: vrat items (kuttu/singhara atta, sabudana, sendha namak), fruits, dry fruits, ghee, mithai
stock_hints.dussehra: mithai, dry fruits, snacks, cold drinks, gift packs
stock_hints.karwa chauth: sargi items (dry fruits, mathri, feni, fruits), mithai, sewai, mehndi, gifts
stock_hints.ahoi ashtami: vrat items, dry fruits, fruits, mithai, puja samagri
stock_hints.dhanteras: steel/utensils, jhaadu, diye, dhania, mithai, dry fruits, gift packs (badi kharidari)
stock_hints.naraka chaturdashi: diye, candles, ubtan, mithai, namkeen, phuljhadi
stock_hints.diwali: diye, candles, mithai, dry fruits, gift packs, namkeen, cold drinks, phuljhadi, Lakshmi-Ganesh murti
stock_hints.govardhan puja: mithai, milk products, annakut raashan, dry fruits, puja samagri
stock_hints.bhai dooj: mithai, dry fruits, chocolates, gift packs, roli-chawal
stock_hints.chhath: thekua saamaan (atta, gud, ghee), kela/nariyal/ganna, soop-daura, diye
stock_hints.guru nanak jayanti: kada prasad (atta, ghee, cheeni), langar raashan, mithai, fruits
stock_hints.eid: sewai/vermicelli, dry fruits, cheeni, ghee, khajoor, doodh, attar
stock_hints.christmas: cake & cake mix, chocolates, candles, dry fruits, snacks, gift packs
stock_hints.new year: namkeen/snacks, cold drinks, chocolates, mithai, gift packs, party items
